Connect Wallet
TRIAS Token Contract Swap
Claim your new tokens and experience safer, more efficient TRIAS (New)!
Learn More
100% Safe
TRIAS (New) contract code has been audited by Certik. It is 100% safe.
BSC Network
Only TRIAS on the BSC network will be subject to a token contract swap.
Swap Rate: 1:1
The original TRIAS token will be replaced with TRIAS (New) at a 1:1 conversion rate.

FAQs
